name: Lasă-mă, îmi place ! Camera 609
overview: The protagonists mistakenly fall in love, leading to a domino-type situation filled with awkwardness and comic situations. A large inheritance, acquired through a special will condition, sparks a tragico-comic competition among contenders.

trailers.title: Lasă mă, îmi place! Camera 609 - Promo Antena 1
